action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 20 CatBoost training failed because default bootstrap type (Bayesian) does not support 'subsample' option. Analysis: must remove 'subsample' or set bootstrap_type='Bernoulli'. Also 'custom_metric' with MAP on continuous labels may cause issues. Decision: fix train.py - remove subsample, remove custom_metric, keep YetiRank with early stopping, retrain CatBoost, submit eval. Remaining time ~65 min, should be enough.
